---
title: "02 QC Overview"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("01_main_setup.R")
module <- "02_qc_overview"
```

```{r}
qc <- read_optional_tsv(file.path(result_dir, "03_qc_filter", "tables", "sample_qc_summary.tsv"))
if (nrow(qc) > 0) {
  write_review_table(qc, module, "sample_qc_summary_review.csv")
  p1 <- qc |>
    pivot_longer(-sample, names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") |>
    ggplot(aes(sample, value, fill = sample)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = rep(pandoraseq_palette, length.out = nrow(qc))) +
    theme_spatial() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)
  save_plot_versions(p1, module, "sample_qc_summary", width = 9, height = 5)
  p1
}
```
